name: forgecode_raw_capability_assimilation
description: ForgeCode assimilation template for raw capability/mechanics extraction and direct runtime mapping without composed lane wrappers.

subtemplates.description: Raw-capability assimilation lane that extracts ForgeCode primitives/mechanics without imposing composed workflow sequencing.

Raw-capability CI lane adapted from ForgeCode matrix/step/workflow generation surfaces to expose deterministic release-matrix expansion, reusable step wiring, and release workflow generation mechanics without composed agent-wrapper assumptions.

Raw-capability infra-auth lane adapted from ForgeCode auth/http strategy surfaces to expose deterministic auth context handling, provider-specific OAuth exchange quirks, and token-derived credential enrichment without composed lane assumptions.

Raw-capability infra-auth storage lane adapted from ForgeCode auth utility, MCP credential store, and rmcp token storage surfaces to expose deterministic token lifecycle handling, durable credential persistence, and provider-quirk-safe refresh behavior without composed lane assumptions.

Raw-capability infra lane adapted from ForgeCode console/environment/executor surfaces to expose deterministic environment projection, config cache/update lifecycle, and command streaming/encoding behavior without composed lane assumptions.

Raw-capability infra filesystem lane adapted from ForgeCode fs create/meta/read/read-dir surfaces to expose deterministic directory setup, metadata probing, filtered listing, and bounded parallel file-read behavior without composed lane assumptions.
Raw-capability infra filesystem lane adapted from ForgeCode fs remove/write/walker/module surfaces to expose deterministic mutation and bounded walk behavior without composed lane assumptions.

Raw-capability infra transport lane adapted from ForgeCode composition/grpc/http/inquire surfaces to expose deterministic service wiring, transport policy enforcement, and async-safe interactive prompting without composed lane assumptions.

Raw-capability infra lane adapted from ForgeCode kv-storage, mcp-server, and ForgeFS read/write primitives to expose deterministic cache, client bind, and file IO behavior without composed lane assumptions.

Raw-capability ForgeFS lane adapted from core fs module/error/file-size/binary primitives to expose deterministic hashing, binary classification, and typed file-error behavior without composed lane assumptions.

Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from json-repair parser/coercion primitives to expose deterministic malformed-json recovery and schema-directed type coercion behavior without composed lane assumptions.

Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from display primitives to expose deterministic code highlighting, diff/grep formatting, and markdown-to-terminal rendering behavior without composed lane assumptions.

Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from main runtime primitives to expose deterministic CLI intent routing, prompt-loop parsing, tool list rendering, and stream-safe terminal output behavior without composed lane assumptions.

Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from main command/prompt/state/tracker primitives to expose deterministic command registration, prompt presentation, state projection, and event telemetry behavior without composed lane assumptions.

Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from main completer primitives to expose deterministic command sentinel handling, file-target completion, and UTF8-safe search marker extraction without composed lane assumptions.

Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from editor/highlighter/constants/utils primitives to expose deterministic input-editing, style-highlighting, display-marker, and humanization behavior without composed lane assumptions.
Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from banner/info/title/sync display primitives to expose deterministic operator-facing rendering behavior without composed lane assumptions.
Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from zsh primitives to expose deterministic shell integration, path-paste wrapping, and zsh prompt-style emission behavior without composed lane assumptions.

Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from workspace attachment, clipper, command, and discovery primitives to expose deterministic file ingress and command-loading mechanics without composed-lane assumptions.

Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from service error, file-discovery, git/walker, and service-container primitives to expose deterministic discovery and service composition mechanics without composed-lane assumptions.

Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from custom-instruction, metadata, module-export, default-permission, and policy-service primitives to expose deterministic instruction and permission mechanics without composed-lane assumptions.

Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from provider auth, provider rendering, range, sync, and template primitives to expose deterministic credential, workspace-sync, and rendering mechanics without composed-lane assumptions.

Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from service utils and formatting snapshots to expose deterministic path validation, temp fixture, diff render, and todo render mechanics without composed-lane assumptions.
Raw-capability ForgeCode lane adapted from removed todo and orchestration prompt snapshots to expose deterministic status-rendering and prompt-context mechanics without composed-lane assumptions.
Raw-capability assimilation lane for ForgeCode prompt-context truncation, changed-file warning, shell-command generation, and compaction-summary mechanics without hardcoded workflow logic.

Raw-capability assimilation lane for ForgeCode repository policy roots covering fast-fail test profile, reproducible dev shell bootstrap, LF shell scripts, churn ignores, and snapshot autocomplete exclusion.
Raw-capability assimilation lane for ForgeCode rustfmt, agent-guideline, Cargo workspace/lockfile, and Cross target mechanics without hardcoded workflow logic.
Raw-capability assimilation lane for ForgeCode license/site/lint/command/app-crate mechanics without hardcoded workflow logic.
Raw-capability assimilation lane for ForgeCode compact-summary, follow-up, and basic file-create operation snapshot mechanics without hardcoded workflow logic.
Raw-capability assimilation lane for ForgeCode file mutation diff and warning receipt snapshot mechanics without hardcoded workflow logic.
